title: Laser's Vanilla Style Villages
description: Adds vanilla-style villages for Mangrove Swamp, Birch Forest, Jungle, Cherry Grove, and Badlands biomes.
body:
![villages](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/data-pack/2023/611/17167718_l.webp)

Adds vanilla-style Mangrove villages that generate in Swamps and Mangrove Swamps, Cherry Villages that generate in Cherry Grove and Flower Forest biomes, Badlands Villages that generate in Badlands, Eroded Badlands, and Wooded Badlands biomes, Birch Villages that generate in Birch Forest and Old Growth Birch Forest biomes, and Jungle Villages that generate in Jungle, Bamboo Jungle, and Sparse Jungle biomes.

(Note that it isn't compatible with other data packs that add new vanilla village variants, since I used the vanilla namespace to be as accurate as possible).

If you have any questions, need extre info about my packs, or just want to hang out, then consider joining my public Discord: https://discord.gg/fkE5s2BARg
